title: Australian Chocolate Pillows
description: A dessert recipe combining Australian hash with roasted chocolate for a unique and delicious treat. These pillows are perfect for a dinner dessert or a late-night snack.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine hash, roasted chocolate, and sugar. Mix well.
In a separate bowl, whisk together milk, egg, and vanilla extract.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
Divide the dough into 6 equal pieces. Roll each piece into a ball and then flatten slightly into a disk shape.
Place the disks onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until the edges are golden brown.
Remove from oven and let cool for 5 minutes.
